page.title: Recommend
page.subtitle: Tell us what you want to build and what you care about; the first pass uses deterministic local rules.

form.title: Need input
form.taskPlaceholder: Example: I need a support agent that answers from our knowledge base with source citations

results.initial: Fill in the need on the left to generate candidates.
results.emptyHint: Try another scenario, loosen access preferences, or use the agents list manually.
results.tooFew: Only {{count}} candidates matched; this category may be underrepresented in the current catalog.

sources.api-fallback: API unavailable; using local rule fallback
